prompt: The sunset slowly sinks toward the sea level, the glow spreads over the sky, dyeing the floating clouds into gold and red brocade, the vast sea surface floats with shimmering light, every surging wave holds up the jumping afterglow. The atmosphere is close to a real beach. Capture a natural dynamic pose, one hand lightly covering part of the face, playful wink, with a light smile, the expression is smart and lively. Adopt high-end fashion magazine shooting techniques, natural and soft environmental side lighting, truly restore skin texture and pore details, hair layers are natural and have a sense of drape; jumpsuit shows natural folds, stress deformation and fabric luster, fashion documentary photography, ultra-realistic picture quality, bright colors, clean composition, prominent subject, 9:16 vertical full-body screen
